channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Promo d’été AliExpress : rejoignez nos 3 lives pour profiter de codes promos exclusifs et de cadeaux [Sponso]
item.description: Pour commencer le mois de juin, on ne vous propose pas un, pas deux, mais bien trois lives en partenariat avec AliExpress pour gagner de très beaux cadeaux à l'occasion de la Promo d'été.

item.title: 15 Best Wireless Chargers, All Tested and Reviewed (2026)
item.description: Stop fumbling for cables in the dark. These WIRED-tested stands and pads will take the hassle out of refueling your phone, wireless earbuds, and watch.

item.title: Rivian's R2 electric SUV launches on June 9
item.description: Rivian is sending out invites and planning the first deliveries for its R2 electric SUV for June 9.

item.title: 'A threat to the First Amendment': ABC blasts FCC over 'extraordinary' license change — as Disney-owned network brands it 'a clear warning to every broadcaster in America'
item.description: ABC has submitted eight broadcast license renewals "under protest" but says the FCC is going too far.

item.title: JD.com, en passe de devenir le 2e actionnaire de Fnac Darty, a-t-il bénéficié de subventions chinoises ? Bruxelles doit trancher
item.description: La Commission européenne vient de mettre le holà sur les velléités du géant de l'e-commerce chinois JD.Com de pénétrer le marché européen. Elle soupçonne le mastodonte, qui veut racheter Ceconomy (le 2e plus gros actionnaire de Fnac Darty), d'avoir reçu des subventions de Pékin qui ont faussé le jeu de la concurrence. Des accusations démenties par le principal intéressé....

item.title: Avec MAI-Image-2.5, Microsoft brouille un peu plus les frontières du réel
item.description: Le nouveau modèle interne de génération d’images par IA de Microsoft passe la seconde. Spécialisé dans les images photoréalistes, Microsoft a concentré ses efforts pour améliorer le rendu visuel, mais aussi textuel de ses images.

item.title: Hundreds of prolific Wikipedia editors are threatening to go on strike
item.description: Wikipedia is one of the last bastions of trust on the internet. But last week, volunteer editors and contributors were alarmed to hear that a small but important team of engineers at the nonprofit that supports it had been laid off. The layoffs didn't just threaten to sever an important link between the Wikimedia Foundation […]

item.title: This chip startup just raised $135M on a bet that AI’s biggest bottleneck isn’t compute — it’s memory
item.description: South Korean chip startup Xcena is betting that AI's real bottleneck is not compute, but memory.

item.title: Rivals season 2 episode 5 confirms who is running rings around the rest in the hit Hulu and Disney+ show — and why their scandalous dream relationship needs to come true
item.description: With one episode to go until the mid-season break, Rivals season 2 episode 5 is getting back on track after some serious shakeups — with one character rising well above the rest.

item.title: This AI startup will clean your home for free to train future robots
item.description: AI training startup Shift wants to clean your home for free. The catch - because, despite what its website says, there's always a catch - is that it will record cleaners as they scrub, vacuum, dust, tidy, and wash, and use that footage to train robots. Shift announced the unusual offer on social media on […]

item.title: En ces temps difficiles, Sandisk prépare de nouveaux SSD… au format SATA
item.description: L'Américain SanDisk s'apprête à commercialiser deux nouveaux modèles de SSD au format SATA. Ce format, surtout utilisé en stockage, connaît un regain de popularité depuis les débuts de la pénurie de mémoire, grâce à des prix plus accessibles que ceux des barrettes M.2 NVMe.

item.title: Massive's pioneering 'Lord of the Rings' crowd simulation software is now free to use
item.description: Massive has released a free version of its pioneering crowd simulator created for Lord of the Rings and used in recent blockbusters like Superman and Avatar.

item.title: 'More drivers than a Formula 1 grid': A&K makes Christmas come early for audiophiles with its new premium audio player packing built-in quad vacuum tubes, plus new 'Tribrid' 9-driver IEMs to pair with it
item.description: Astell & Kern has unveiled a new DAP, called the SP4000T, and new in-ear monitors called the Clarus, and they're not messing around when it comes to audiophile appeal

item.title: Forza Horizon : ce mod suit les mouvements de votre tête pour doper l’immersion
item.description: Utiliser la webcam juchée au-dessus de votre écran pour suivre automatiquement les mouvements de votre tête lorsque vous jouez à Forza Horizon 6, c'est le concept d'un mod lancé récemment. Présentations.

item.title: Lenovo ThinkVision M14t Gen 2 deal: Our favorite 2.2K touchscreen portable monitor for business and creative professionals just dropped in price
item.description: Ideal for on-the-go creative professionals and business travelers.

item.title: Amazon casse le prix de la JBL Xtreme 4, une excellente enceinte notée 9/10 et deux fois moins chère que sa remplaçante
item.description: La JBL Xtreme 4 est une enceinte complète sur bien des aspects, à commencer par son design, facilitant le transport grâce à sa sangle. En ce moment, elle s'offre plus de 40 % de réduction chez Amazon.

item.title: 'With all due respect, I hope this fails miserably': this AI-only streaming service will launch soon — and filmmakers are hoping it crashes and burns
item.description: Artlist TV is launching next week, and will give you non-stop AI-generated content over the internet.

item.title: The Morning After: Apple's dramatic Siri overhaul is coming and it might look like this
item.description: The biggest news stories of the week: An early look at the new version of Siri, reviews of Google's new wearable, GoPro's newest action cam and more!

item.title: Yes, The Witcher 3 Songs of the Past will feature new Gwent cards, and cross-platform mod support is still happening — 'We are still working away on it, rest assured it is coming'
item.description: New Gwent cards are coming to The Witcher 3: Wild Hunt's third expansion, Songs of the Past, and cross-platform mod support is still in the works.

item.title: This is MSI’s new Claw 8 EX AI Plus gaming handheld
item.description: MSI has unveiled a new Claw 8 handheld gaming PC ahead of the Computex 2026 show, and this model swaps out its predecessors' Intel Lunar Lake mobile chip for a specialized handheld processor. MSI describes the Claw 8 EX AI Plus as being the "world's first" handheld to contain the recently announced Intel Arc G3 […]

item.title: AeroPress just launched a stylish new manual coffee grinder with titanium burrs that you can crank by hand — or with an electric drill
item.description: The latest iteration of the AeroPress Manual Coffee Grinder is tougher than ever, and even has an electric drill attachment in case your hands get tired.

item.title: Un vaisseau privé part en juin sauver un télescope de la NASA avant qu’il ne brûle dans l’atmosphère
item.description: Le télescope Swift de la NASA, sans moteur, tombe vers la Terre. Un vaisseau privé part en juin pour le capturer et le repousser en orbite. Une première mondiale.

item.title: This MacBook Privacy Screen Totally Changed How I Work in Public
item.description: I'm one of those people who enjoy on planes and in public spaces in general. But the issue of privacy was always a hurdle.

item.title: How to watch Gujarat Titans vs Rajasthan Royals: live stream 2026 IPL Qualifier 2 from anywhere
item.description: All the ways to watch Gujarat Titans vs Rajasthan Royals live streams in the IPL 2026 Qualifier 2 from anywhere in the world, even for free.

item.title: 'The next best place to get visibility': Backrooms movie director Kane Parsons gives his take on why YouTube has become a breeding ground for a new golden generation of horror film creators
item.description: The filmmaker behind A24's The Backrooms adaptation has his say on Hollywood's recent obsession with YouTube horror creators.

item.title: Uber will offer shuttle rides from select FIFA World Cup stadiums in the US
item.description: Uber is rolling out options and features that cater to fans watching FIFA World Cup matches.

item.title: Babylist built a $750 million registry empire. Now it’s betting on ‘Trump accounts’ for kids
item.description: With the launch of Babylist Money, the company is moving beyond the nursery and into long-term financial planning. When Babylist’s founder and CEO, Natalie Gordon, was growing up, she wasn’t always excited about opening her Christmas and birthday presents. Every year, members of her family—especially her grandmother—would contribute money to her college fund. Today, she’s grateful they did....

item.title: Congrats on that promotion. Are you sure you want it?
item.description: How to tell if a step up is right for you. “I wish I had slowed down to reflect more deeply on this opportunity before saying yes.”

item.title: Why building AI applications still means building infrastructure-first
item.description: Building strong, governed data infrastructure enables AI to scale securely, reliably, and efficiently in production.

item.title: Bye-bye Nvidia : le coup de poker de BYD avec sa puce autonome Xuanji A3 en 4 nm
item.description: BYD a dévoilé le 28 mai son Xuanji A3, qu'il présente comme la première puce automobile chinoise gravée en 4 nm conçue en interne, certifiée pour la conduite autonome de niveau 3 et 4. Le message est clair : le constructeur veut se passer de Nvidia et se revendique aujourd'hui comme le seul à maîtriser toute la chaîne du silicium en interne.

item.title: Why firms are quietly rehiring staff AI was supposed to replace
item.description: Human oversight makes enterprise AI reliable and safe

item.title: L’iPhone 18 Pro fuite en images : voici les 4 coloris de la future gamme
item.description: Le leaker Sonny Dickson a publié plusieurs clichés de maquettes présumées de l'iPhone 18 Pro. Comme on peut le voir, le design global resterait, sans surprise, très proche de l’actuel iPhone 17 Pro.

item.title: HP Omnibook 3 Review: Redefining the Budget Laptop
item.description: To get to $600, Apple and HP made different compromises. If you demand more power and performance, the HP Omnibook 3 delivers.

item.title: Xiaomi retire déjà 100 € à son nouveau 17T Pro, un photophone très doué avec une autonomie monstrueuse
item.description: À peine sorti, le nouveau Xiaomi 17T Pro est déjà proposé à un prix réduit. Ce champion de l'autonomie et de la photo est en effet affiché à 903 euros au lieu de 1 003 sur le site de Xiaomi, qui met en plus à disposition un bonus reprise.

item.title: Physical Media Is Making a Comeback. The Next Console Generation Might Kill It
item.description: Consoles with disc drives are the easiest way to enjoy all kinds of physical media, but that could end with the next-gen PlayStation 6 and Microsoft's Project Helix.

item.title: Star City team 'became experts' on filming space during Apple TV sci-fi hit For All Mankind — and controversial 'deepfakes' and AI usage might make a return
item.description: The team behind new Apple TV sci-fi series Star City reveal how much they learned about filming space on For All Mankind.

item.title: End of ‘The Line’: A timeline of Saudi Arabia’s failed rendering city
item.description: The horizontal skyscraper sci-fi dream is now just a colossal crater in the desert. Saudi Arabia has halted construction on The Line, the over-hyped megacity that was supposed to slice through the sand like a mirrored sword, until 2030—LOL!—after multiple delays and downsizings. Anyone with two functioning eyes and three ounces of brain tissue could have predicted this spectacular crash. The concept blatantly defied basic physics and economics. It was a sci-fi fever dream doomed the second it left the rendering farm....

item.title: CD Projekt Red confirms The Witcher 3 Songs of the Past will be 'familiar' for lovers of the legendary Blood & Wine expansion
item.description: CD Projekt Red has shared new details about The Witcher 3: Wild Hunt's third expansion, Songs of the Past.

item.title: Dyson's latest purifier uses AI tech to track your movements so the cool air goes wherever you do
item.description: The new Dyson Find+Follow Purifier Cool uses intelligent tracking to direct air and save energy too

item.title: Google Photos pourrait transformer vos Souvenirs en vidéos TikTok
item.description: Google teste de nouveaux outils pour éditer les Souvenirs des utilisateurs et en faire des vidéos plus facilement partageables.

item.title: The hidden operational costs of agentic AI
item.description: Agentic AI shifts enterprise infrastructure toward continuous, efficient, autonomous compute at scale.

item.title: 7 best wedding planning apps for 2026 couples
item.description: Top wedding planning apps, according to Reddit users and others.
